ramune.sgum.batteryswapupgrade.name: Seaglide battery swap upgrade
ramune.sgum.batteryswapupgrade.desc: Automatically swaps out depleted batteries for the highest charge battery in your battery storage. Each upgrade adds +1 slot to your battery storage. Seaglide compatible. Does stack.
ramune.sgum.boostupgrade.name: Seaglide boost upgrade
ramune.sgum.boostupgrade.desc: While active, enhances mobility at the cost of increased battery usage. Seaglide compatible. Does not stack.
ramune.sgum.efficiencyupgrade.name: Seaglide efficiency upgrade
ramune.sgum.efficiencyupgrade.desc: Recycles heat by-product to minimize power inefficiencies. Seaglide compatible. Does stack.
ramune.sgum.speedupgrade.name: Seaglide speed upgrade
ramune.sgum.speedupgrade.desc: Increases maximum speed without increasing power draw. Seaglide compatible. Does stack.
